recommendations.title: The Man Who Sleeps
recommendations.overview: A young student decides to have no more interaction with the world than is needed to minimally sustain life. His increasingly automaton-like behavior is coupled with a strange clarity of insight about the world around him.

recommendations.title: The Trouble with You
recommendations.overview: Detective Yvonne is the widow of police chief Santi, a local hero in a town on the French Riviera. When she learns he was in fact a crooked cop, she tries to right his wrongs. Crossing paths with Antoine, a victim of Santi, sets off a series of wild

recommendations.title: Palm Springs
recommendations.overview: When carefree Nyles and reluctant maid of honor Sarah have a chance encounter at a Palm Springs wedding, things get complicated when they find themselves unable to escape the venue, themselves, or each other.

recommendations.title: Hairspray Live!
recommendations.genres: Romance, Comedy, Drama, TV Movie, Music
recommendations.overview: A teenage girl living in Baltimore in the early 1960s dreams of appearing on a popular TV dance show.

recommendations.title: Bubble Boy
recommendations.overview: Jimmy is a young man who was born without an immune system and has lived his life within a plastic bubble in his bedroom... who pines for the sweet caresses of girl-next-door Chloe. But when Chloe decides to marry her high school boyfriend, Jimmy – b

recommendations.title: You're Killing Me Susana
recommendations.overview: An actor's world comes crashing down after he learns that his wife has left him.

recommendations.title: Better Than Chocolate
recommendations.overview: Not long after moving into her own place, Maggie finds herself with two unsolicited roommates: her recently divorced mother, Lila, and her young brother. The timing is especially bad, considering Maggie has fallen hard for an attractive woman, Kim, o

recommendations.title: Here After
recommendations.overview: When her teen daughter displays increasingly disturbing behavior after a near death experience, a mother becomes convinced the girl brought something evil back from the other side.

recommendations.title: Faults
recommendations.overview: Claire is under the grip of a mysterious new cult called Faults. Desperate to be reunited with their daughter, Claire's parents recruit one of the world's foremost experts on mind control, Ansel Roth.

recommendations.title: Not Suitable For Children
recommendations.overview: A young playboy who learns he has one month until he becomes infertile sets out to procreate as much as possible.
